name: bloodhound-ce-python
title: bloodhound-ce-python
summary: Python based ingestor for BloodHound CE
description:
Python based ingestor for BloodHound CE
This package contains a Python based ingestor for BloodHound CE, based on
Impacket.
.
This tool is only compatible with BloodHound CE. For legacy Bloodhound
(<= 4.3.1) use bloodhound-python package.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for bloodhound-ce-python.
arguments.raw: -ce-python  Option present in package usage line for bloodhound-ce-python.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bloodhound-ce-python because Python based ingestor for BloodHound CE.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bloodhound-ce-python as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `bloodhound-ce-python [options] [args]` as documented upstream for bloodhound-ce-python.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bloodhound-ce-python with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bloodhound-ce-python --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -ce-python
